style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white flicker around Slowpoke's body, drifting upward like tiny lightning bolts, while glowing energy trails of vibrant yellow-orange streak behind its slow movements. A pulsing electromagnetic aura of electric violet radiates from its eyes and tail, distorting the air with subtle shimmering waves. The lighting mood is a dynamic mix of cool electric blue and warm amber, casting sharp, energetic highlights on its fur. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
